summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing for iteration 4 features: Agent Detail page, Live Demo chat modal, updated Marketplace cards, and badge removal. All core functionality working correctly.
passed_tests: Emergent badge successfully removed from all pages
Marketplace cards have Live Demo links and clickable titles
Live Demo link navigation to /agent/:id?demo=true works correctly
Agent title click navigation to /agent/:id works correctly
Agent Detail page shows Customer Service Pro with correct details (@CXMaster, 4.9 rating, 98 trust score)
Agent Detail shows correct stats (847 deploys, < 15 min setup, 124 users)
Agent Detail shows correct pricing (Rent $49/mo, Buy $499)
Rent/Buy buttons show correct toast messages
Live Demo modal opens with agent greeting and chat functionality
Live Demo chat simulation with agent-specific responses and typing animation
Demo modal close button (X) works correctly
Overview tab shows About this agent and Features sections
Reviews tab shows 4 reviews with ratings and text
Back to Marketplace link works correctly
Try Live Demo button in sidebar opens demo modal
Demo video placeholder section is visible
Marketplace search functionality works correctly
Category filtering works on Marketplace (All, Support, Sales, etc.)
Home page waitlist functionality works
Login flow works with admin@nova.ai credentials
Navigation between Home, Academy, Marketplace works correctly
